venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with open-seating service. Daily-changing menus blend contemporary cuisine with destination-inspired ingredients. Complimentary caviar available on request. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant aft. Buffet breakfast and lunch daily; regionally themed dinner service in the evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio
venues.description: Open-air deck venue serving casual lunches: burgers, salads, grilled seafood, and light bites. Open most afternoons at sea and in port. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill by Thomas Keller
venues.description: Seabourn Pursuit continues the expedition fleet's signature dining concept. Chef Thomas Keller's classic chophouse menu: prime beef, Dover sole meunière, and signature sides. Complimentary; advance reservations required.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: The social hub — complimentary specialty coffees, pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day. Concierge and guest services also located here.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full Restaurant menu during dinner hours; breakfast, lunch, and snack menus throughout the day.
